description: WAF dataset schema (CSV) v3 — extended with TCP flags, query params, cookie/auth/x-forwarded-for, and full response fields
file_format: CSV (.csv) with header row, appended per record, rotated daily

field_descriptions.query_string: Raw query string portion of URI (after '?'), empty if none
field_descriptions.query_params_json: JSON-serialized dict of parsed query parameters, e.g. {"page": ["1"]}
field_descriptions.cookie_hash: SHA-256 hash of Cookie header value for correlation without exposing sensitive data
field_descriptions.authorization_type: Authorization scheme only (e.g. 'Bearer', 'Basic'), value stripped for privacy
field_descriptions.tcp_flags: TCP flags hex value (e.g. '0x0018'), empty if not from PCAP
field_descriptions.tcp_flags_str: Human-readable TCP flags (e.g. 'PSH,ACK'), empty if not from PCAP
field_descriptions.response_status: HTTP response status code (e.g. 200, 404), 0 if no response captured
field_descriptions.response_time_ms: Latency in milliseconds (response timestamp - request timestamp), -1 if unavailable
field_descriptions.response_body_len_original: Original response body length in bytes

privacy.authorization_handling: Scheme type only (e.g. Bearer), token value stripped

backward_compatibility.note: v3 is a superset of v2. New fields are appended after existing v2 fields. Old CSV files (v2) can be loaded by ignoring missing columns.
